source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for technical route planning UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for headings, body, labels, and coordinate numerals.
layout: Compact 8px planning grids, wadi-channel route dividers, sandstone card boundaries, waypoint tables, elevation charts, and dense field-operations dashboards.

prompts.label: Transparent wadi channel motif source
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source for `/systems/morphous-wadi/motif.png`
Primary request: Create only a wadi channel motif for a landscape design system named Morphous Wadi, isolated full subject, no text.
Scene/backdrop: The subject must sit on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for background removal.
Subject: A compact desert canyon wadi channel cutout: carved sandstone banks in warm sand-stone tones, dry braided streambed lines, small acacia-green shrubs on the margins, a clear sky-blue ribbon/reflection accent, and route-like natural channel geometry.
Composition/framing: centered complete motif with generous padding; do not crop the canyon edges, channel, shrubs, or sky accents. Keep a clean silhouette suitable for a transparent catalog motif.
Lighting/mood: crisp desert daylight, route planning system feel, readable sandstone texture, natural shadows only on the subject itself.
Transparent workflow: background must be one uniform #ff00ff color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no people, vehicles, buildings, signs, map pins, text, watermark, border, decorative background, or contact shadow.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board for `/systems/morphous-wadi/design-system-light.png`
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Wadi" derived from a transparent motif of a desert canyon wadi channel.
Reference motif description: warm sandstone canyon banks, dry braided streambed geometry, acacia-green shrubs, a narrow sky-blue water/reflection ribbon, route-like channel curves, crisp desert daylight.
System feel: route planning system for field logistics, path comparison, waypoint review, terrain constraints, dry wash navigation, and schedule confidence.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, 4K-class composition. Make all labels large enough to read in gallery preview.
Required visible sections: Morphous Wadi, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Route Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples with Geist and Noto Sans JP guidance; use clean route-planning labels, map-coordinate numerals, and concise UI copy.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, route list, waypoint cards, elevation/flow charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Palette direction: sand-stone background and surfaces, sandstone ink and borders, acacia green primary actions, sky blue focus and route accents, dry wash muted neutrals, deep canyon dark text. Avoid purple gradients and unrelated saturated colors.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise 8px grid, 8px card radius, sandstone contour dividers, route-channel curves used sparingly as separators, utilitarian route planning interface.
Constraints: no people, no vehicles, no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible tiny token tables, no misspelling of "Morphous Wadi".

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board for `/systems/morphous-wadi/design-system-dark.png`
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode companion board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Wadi". It must feel like the same route planning system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference system: desert canyon wadi channel motif with warm sandstone banks, braided dry wash geometry, acacia-green shrubs, a narrow sky-blue water/reflection route accent, and utilitarian route-planning workflows.
System feel: night operations route planning system for field logistics, waypoint review, terrain constraints, flash-flood status, route comparison, and schedule confidence.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, 4K-class composition. Make all labels large enough to read in gallery preview.
Required visible sections: Morphous Wadi, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Route Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples with Geist and Noto Sans JP guidance; use clean route-planning labels, coordinate numerals, and concise UI copy.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, route list, waypoint cards, elevation/flow charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Palette direction: deep canyon ink background, warm sandstone cards and borders, acacia green primary actions, sky blue focus and active route accents, dry wash muted neutrals, pale sand foreground. Preserve the same roles from the light board.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise 8px grid, 8px card radius, sandstone contour dividers, route-channel curves used sparingly as separators, restrained high-contrast dark operations interface.
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure black only background, no purple gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no people, no vehicles, no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible tiny token tables, no misspelling of "Morphous Wadi".
